expected_outcome: Solid grasp of semantic HTML5 markup structure, creating forms, embedding media, optimizing for SEO, and organizing web documents professionally.

phases.practice_schedule: 1 Hour daily writing basic webpage structures and creating text outlines.

mini_project.title: Topic Index Document
mini_project.description: Create a clean, multi-section webpage about a topic utilizing tags, tables of contents, lists, and external links.

phases.milestone: Mastered standard document configurations, headings hierarchy, links, and list structures.

topics.name: Web Forms Design
subtopics: Input categories (text, password, email, date, radio, checkbox)

phases.practice_schedule: 1.5 Hours daily compiling semantic layouts and input registration forms.

mini_project.title: Interactive Survey Form Page
mini_project.description: Build an HTML survey form incorporating text inputs, rating scales, date pickers, dropdown selects, and feedback checkboxes.

phases.milestone: Familiar with writing readable, SEO-optimized layouts, database-ready forms, and structured tables.

topics.name: SEO & Performance metadata
subtopics: Open Graph settings for social sharing

phases.practice_schedule: 1 Hour daily embedding audio/video files and setting tags for responsiveness checks.

mini_project.title: Recipes Portal Layout Page
mini_project.description: Create a multimedia-rich recipes page containing descriptive lists, embedded video guides, header navigation, and structured meta tags.

phases.milestone: Equipped to develop fully accessible, indexable, semantic, and media-rich HTML5 pages.

major_projects.title: Web Portfolio Structure Outline
major_projects.description: Write the structural HTML outline for a comprehensive portfolio site, utilizing header profiles, navigation tabs, project pages tables, registration contacts forms, and SEO metadata.
